pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 19, line 29 (wp user create command), export_result.sh line 19
WooCommerce Code Reference confirms checkbox option stores 'yes' or 'no' values (default is 'no'). verifier.py lines 48-50 checks for 'yes', '1', or 'true'.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves processing a GDPR data erasure request for a synthetic customer named Sarah Connor with email sarah.connor.privacy@example.com. The customer and associated order data are created by the task setup script (setup_task.sh) and are entirely synthetic. The task requires enabling the WooCommerce setting 'woocommerce_erasure_request_removes_order_data' to 'yes', which is a real WooCommerce privacy setting that controls whether personal data is removed from orders when processing GDPR erasure requests. This setting defaults to 'no' and must be explicitly enabled via WordPress admin settings (WooCommerce > Settings > Accounts & Privacy).
